allow: Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; im=Image.open\('cand_dentual_logo.jpg'\); print\(im.size\)")

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5500 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { "PORT 5500 LISTENING \(PID\(s\): " + \(\($conn.OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique\) -join ', '\) + "\)" } else { "PORT 5500 NOT LISTENING" }; "--- python processes ---"; Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String)

PowerShell($tmp = Join-Path $env:TEMP "uipro-src"; if \(Test-Path $tmp\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmp }; git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill.git $tmp; Write-Output "---DONE---"; $tmp)

PowerShell($tmp = Join-Path $env:TEMP "uipro-src"; Get-ChildItem -Force $tmp | Select-Object Mode,Name; Write-Output "=== .claude ==="; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force \(Join-Path $tmp ".claude"\) | Select-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\($tmp,''\) })

PowerShell($dest = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE ".claude\\skills"; Write-Output "DEST: $dest"; if \(Test-Path $dest\) { Get-ChildItem -Directory $dest | Select-Object Name } else { Write-Output "\(skills dir does not exist yet\)" })

PowerShell($src = Join-Path $env:TEMP "uipro-src\\.claude\\skills"; $dest = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE ".claude\\skills"; Get-ChildItem -Directory $src | ForEach-Object { $target = Join-Path $dest $_.Name; if \(Test-Path $target\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $target }; Copy-Item -Recurse -Force $_.FullName $target; Write-Output \("Copied: " + $_.Name\) })
PowerShell($tmp = Join-Path $env:TEMP "uipro-src"; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmp; Write-Output "Temp clone removed.")

PowerShell($r = "C:\\Users\\buqra\\Desktop\\Dentual\\assets\\results"; Remove-Item -Force \(Join-Path $r "case6-before.webp"\),\(Join-Path $r "case6-after.webp"\); Write-Output "Removed case6 assets."; Get-ChildItem $r -Name)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\buqra\\Desktop\\Dentual"; python tools/gen_pages.py 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 2; Write-Output "---checks---"; \(Select-String -Path "subeler/selcuklu/index.html" -Pattern 'data-skin="premium"' | Measure-Object\).Count; \(Select-String -Path "subeler/selcuklu/index.html" -Pattern 'theme-premium.css\\?v=' | Measure-Object\).Count; \(Select-String -Path "index.html" -Pattern 'theme-premium.css\\?v=' | Measure-Object\).Count)

Bash(node -e "try{const c=require\(process.env.USERPROFILE+'/.claude.json'\);const top=Object.keys\(c.mcpServers||{}\);console.log\('global mcpServers:',top.length?top.join\(', '\):'\(yok\)'\);const proj=c.projects||{};for\(const p of Object.keys\(proj\)\){const m=proj[p].mcpServers?Object.keys\(proj[p].mcpServers\):[];if\(m.length\)console.log\('['+p+'] ->',m.join\(', '\)\);}}catch\(e\){console.log\('okunamadı:',e.message\)}")

PowerShell($node = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); $py = \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); $soffice = \(Get-Command soffice -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); Write-Output "node: $\($node.Source\)"; Write-Output "npm: $\(\(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source\)"; Write-Output "python: $\($py.Source\)"; if\($py\){ python --version }; Write-Output "soffice: $\($soffice.Source\)"; $lo = Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files\\LibreOffice\\program\\soffice.exe' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "LibreOffice path: $\($lo.FullName\)"; python -c "import pptx; print\('python-pptx', pptx.__version__\)" 2>$null; if\($node\){ npm ls -g pptxgenjs 2>$null })
